title: Crawfurdia bomareoides
intro: Crawfurdia bomareoides, also known as the Himalayan gentian, is a flowering plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Crawfurdia bomareoides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and iridoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or a powder, and is commonly used in herbal remedies such as teas, capsules, and tablets.
